summary: Created complete newsletter content with all required sections: subject lines, preheader, co-leads intro, community highlights, survey insights with key stats and quotes, and event details for Feb 26 Happy Hour and upcoming Q1 events. Content follows V-voice principles with direct, concise, authentic tone suitable for FOHE NYC community.
learnings: Survey insights provided rich specific data (59 responses, 66% want panels, 41 AI mentions) that made for compelling newsletter stats
Community quotes from survey added authentic voice to complement data points
Slack highlights from Drop 2 translated well into newsletter-friendly community updates with energy and specificity
Voice lessons retrieval failed due to quota issues but V-voice principles from Writer persona provided sufficient guidance
